      "text": "Tadehſt wiſſi/ kaſ tevi

Zeetumâ/ un kaſ tevi aplaupa/
buhs pattht par Laupijumu/ un
wiſſi/ kaſ tevi iſpohtta / foßs
nodohſchu es par Iſpohſtſchonu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo es attat aiſſeeschu ta-
waz Wahtis/ un dfeedinaſchu
tawu Wainu/ faſka tas KUNGS:
Tapehz ka tee tevi noſauz to
Aisdihtu/ tcht irr Ziana/ (faſka
tee/) neweens waiza pehz tahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Taſaka tas KUNGS:
Redſ/ Es atgreeſischu to Zeetu-
mu to Dshwoſtu Jehaba / un
apſchehloſchohs pahr winhu
Mahjas-Weetahn/ un tas Pilß-

ſtahwehs ſawâ wezzâ Weetâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un no tennenes iſees Pa-

"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winna Dehſi buhs ka

taps wannâ Preeſchâ ſtiprina-
ta / un es peemekleſchu wiſſus
winna Apbehdiſatajsus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winna Zeenigajs buhs
no winna/ un winna Waldneeks
nahks no winna Widurs/ un es
liſſchu Winnu tuwu nahkt/ un
wiꞥſch nahks pee mannim tu-
wu. Jo kaſ tas tahds/ kaſ lab-
bis prahitis * Galivneeks tohp/
"

    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "un pee mannim tuwu nahk? fa

mats peeminnehts : Jo to Preeſteru Aim
irr, ka tee pee Deewa taunu nahk 2. Mohſ:

ſtoris pee Krusta Kohka preeſſch muhſ

    {
      "n": 22,

    {
      "n": 23,

      "text": "Redſi/ weena Wehtra

wu.

      "text": "Tas Karſtums ta KU
GA Bahrsibaß ne mittefees/ t

    {
      "n": 1,

      "text": "Ta XXXI. Nodalla.

Un no tahß muhſchigas Derribas
